captures.request_content_type: POST with extensive query params (chatId, conversationTurnId, domain=youchat, selectedChatMode, traceId). Body present (POST).
captures.success_response_wire_sample: POST /api/streamingSearch -> 200, SSE stream of youChatToken / search-result events (known you.com event-typed SSE: events like 'youChatToken', 'thirdPartySearchResults'). Raw body unavailable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard -> CDP/HAR needed for exact event frames. Companion: /api/eventLogger, /api/instrumentation, /api/entitlements/{ari,pair,freemium}, /api/user/getYouProState.
captures.frame_separator: SSE event:/data: lines (event-typed) separated by double-newline — inferred from text/event-stream + you.com known schema; not byte-confirmed
captures.dom_render_structure: message node div[data-testid="qb_message"]; web-results div[data-testid="youchat-web-results-panel"]; vanilla-extract atomic hashed classes (_120u3vh*, qi87at0). User query rendered as h1-style heading; assistant answer + 'You may also want to ask' follow-ups.
captures.framework: Next.js + vanilla-extract (atomic CSS, hashed class atoms)
captures.console_errors: not separately polled; no functional error, normal answer rendered. Free-trial account (Upgrade prompts shown).

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. OPENED A FRESH TAB (tabId 115268444) — did NOT touch supervisor scratch tab (115268428, the one with PII in its URL). Account was already logged in (장희 최, Free trial) -> auth_state=logged-in. Chat endpoint = POST /api/streamingSearch (SSE, youchat domain). Prompt verbatim; assistant replied normally. NOTE: you.com places the prompt text in the page URL ?q= by its own design (service behavior, observation only). First-send request was cleared by /chat->/search nav; follow-up benign prompt surfaced live streamingSearch endpoint. Raw SSE event frames not sampled (taint-guard) -> CDP/HAR for exact bytes.
